component.name: Bevy Open Siege
component.summary: Lane-defense strategy with plant tactics and escalating undead waves

description.p: Bevy Open Siege is a single-player lane-defense strategy game about holding the last greenhouse line with specialized plants, sun economy, and a 10-level campaign.
The release-candidate package includes bilingual English and Chinese localization, production PNG art, synthesized music and sound effects, persistent progress, and keyboard and mouse controls.
